principles.title: Invariant-First
principles.description: System logic must prioritize mathematical certainty and state invariants over simple input validation.

principles.title: Zero-Trust Architecture
principles.description: Treat every boundary as a potential failure point; assume all external inputs and internal states are hostile until verified.

principles.title: Deterministic Execution
principles.description: Side effects must be isolated. Given the same input and state, the system must produce the identical output every time.
